failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: AIJ4tk
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Database unreachable from this runtime; verify DATABASE_URL / network configuration with operators (internal hostname references are redacted).","timestamp":"2026-04-20T01:37:45.871319+00:00","correlation_id":"7009d81c-21b4-4d93-b32a-2bc749277b4c"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"chunking_config": {}, "crawl_config": {}, "metadata": {"source": "openapi-example"}, "url": "https://www.city.gov/housing/guide", "user_id": "schemathesis"}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/modal-jobs/scraper

Reproduce with:
curl -X GET 'https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/ask?question=0&thread_id=null'
